_comment: Go project hooks example. Copy to your project's .claude/settings.json
_usage: Place this content in your project's .claude/settings.json file

hooks.command: FILE_PATH="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.go$'; then if command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -w "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; if command -v goimports >/dev/null 2>&1; then goimports -w "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE_PATH=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"$/\1/' 2>/dev/null); PROTECTED='.env .secret credentials go.sum private_key vendor'; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE_PATH" in *$p*) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot edit protected file: $FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 2;; esac; done; exit 0
